dataSources.name: AWS
dataSources.description: Investigate issues across CloudTrail, EC2, RDS, EKS, Load Balancers, and Cost Explorer by querying AWS APIs directly.

dataSources.name: Azure
dataSources.description: Query any Azure service through Azure Resource Manager to investigate infrastructure and application issues.

dataSources.name: GCP
dataSources.description: Investigate issues across GKE, networking, IAM, Cloud Logging, Monitoring, and Storage by querying Google Cloud APIs.

dataSources.name: MariaDB
dataSources.description: Analyze database performance, investigate deadlocks, and optimize slow queries by connecting directly to your MariaDB instances.

dataSources.name: MongoDB Atlas
dataSources.description: Monitor cluster health, analyze performance bottlenecks, and diagnose query issues in your MongoDB Atlas deployment.

dataSources.name: Azure SQL
dataSources.description: Monitor database health, analyze performance bottlenecks, and diagnose query issues in your Azure SQL instances.

dataSources.name: GitHub
dataSources.description: Investigate CI/CD failures, review pull requests, and analyze repository activity across your GitHub organization.

dataSources.name: ArgoCD
dataSources.description: Investigate application sync failures, rollout issues, and deployment health in your ArgoCD-managed Kubernetes environments.

dataSources.name: Splunk
dataSources.description: Search logs, investigate security events, and analyze application behavior by querying your Splunk deployment.

dataSources.name: Datadog Logs
dataSources.description: Search and analyze application and infrastructure logs stored in your Datadog account for troubleshooting.

dataSources.name: Grafana Loki
dataSources.description: Search and analyze aggregated logs in your Grafana Loki instance for troubleshooting and root cause analysis.

dataSources.name: OpenSearch Logs
dataSources.description: Search and analyze logs stored in your OpenSearch cluster for troubleshooting and root cause analysis.

dataSources.name: Elasticsearch
dataSources.description: Search and analyze data in your Elasticsearch cluster for log, metric, and trace investigation.

dataSources.name: Prometheus
dataSources.description: Query metrics and alerting rules from your Prometheus instance to investigate performance and availability issues.

dataSources.name: Datadog Metrics
dataSources.description: Query infrastructure and application metrics from your Datadog account to investigate performance issues.

dataSources.name: OpenSearch Metrics
dataSources.description: Query and analyze metrics stored in your OpenSearch cluster to investigate performance and availability issues.

dataSources.name: Grafana Tempo
dataSources.description: Search and analyze distributed traces from your Grafana Tempo instance to investigate latency and service dependencies.

dataSources.name: Datadog APM
dataSources.description: Analyze application traces and performance data from Datadog APM to investigate latency and service issues.

dataSources.name: OpenSearch Traces
dataSources.description: Search and analyze distributed traces in your OpenSearch cluster to investigate service performance and latency.

dataSources.name: New Relic
dataSources.description: Query logs, metrics, and traces from your New Relic account for full-stack troubleshooting and root cause analysis.

dataSources.name: Coralogix
dataSources.description: Query logs, metrics, and traces from your Coralogix account for full-stack troubleshooting and root cause analysis.

dataSources.name: Dynatrace
dataSources.description: Query logs, metrics, and traces from your Dynatrace environment for full-stack troubleshooting and root cause analysis.

dataSources.name: ServiceNow
dataSources.description: Search incidents, change requests, and CMDB records in your ServiceNow instance for IT service management context.
